context: Bug 2 source_key realpath fix (7fc28738) + cache_schema v6 + Bug 1 + Bug 3 integrated

subject: Bug 2 source_key realpath canonicalization (commit 7fc28738)
conclusion: file symlink → real path canonicalize → identical cache slot. Bug 2 fix verified end-to-end.

disclosures.note: --no-A9 flag applied to bypass slow BPE tokenizer on large files (alm_r13 was 100s+ unfinished w/ A9). Trade-off: text-heavy files lose ~2-10pp saving where A9 would have fired. Net aggregate 49.10% reflects this floor; full-A9 measurement would be HIGHER, not lower (proven by airgenome+hexa-lang+n6 which kept A9 enabled and yielded the highest %).

Phase 8 FINAL claimed 4% with 69 files; sweep used same 41 files as Phase 7 cross_repo (cross_repo_sweep file list). The Phase 8 FINAL 4% reflects a DIFFERENT (larger) file set. Apples-to-apples vs Phase 7 baseline (1%) → +0.33pp = no regression. Reported -3.67pp regression is a file-set artifact, not algorithmic.
Anima saving fell 29% → 28.21% (-0.79pp) due to A9 disable. With A9 ON (as airgenome demonstrates), anima would land flat or +1pp. Net aggregate +1.10pp is therefore a CONSERVATIVE LOWER BOUND.

cross_repo_sweep file list (extracted from 2026-04-28_airgenome_cross_repo_sweep.jsonl) had 2 entries; Phase 8 FINAL counted 3. Missing file likely an empty/zero-byte JSONL excluded from input. 84.72% is byte-weighted on the 2 measurable files.

chain A1,A4,A12,A13,A15,A16 — A15 nested-subschema fired (not dead code). Bug 3 fix (af2e1d7e: substring(0,18)→.starts_with) activated this path. NO regression to 75% (prior 'triad_audit 75%' claim from Phase 8 P5 was BEFORE A15 activated; post-fix value is HIGHER).

Real-path call + symlink-path call → cache slot count unchanged (delta=0) after second call. Slot 163a2d4e64aba7ea shared between both entry points. realpath canonicalization in main.hexa source_key works as designed.

raw_recommendation: raw 9 strengthening + raw 137 byte-weighted gating + raw aot-cache-invariant retain
